MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

DEFENDANTS POWER AUTO GLASS, INC., A CORPORATION AND JACKY FONG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS A DUPLICATE ENTRY.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID RAZAVI, TEL. NO. 895-0098 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS POWER AUTO GLASS, INCORPORATED AND JACKY FONG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT - The Court denies the motion. Defendant unreasonably delayed filing this motion, fails to demonstrate excusable neglect in not responding to the complaint, and makes no showing regarding a meritorious defense to the action. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-15-2013 Continued To Sep-23-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS POWER AUTO GLASS, INC., A CORPORATION & JACKY FONG's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT is continued to September 23, 2013, to give the moving party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The Court has the opposition. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
